provenance: Created from scratch for the public portfolio demo; not derived from real user data.

memories.title: Greenhouse notification policy
memories.content: The Aurora greenhouse team decided to send one daily digest instead of immediate sensor alerts.
memories.raw_content: For Aurora, let's use a daily digest. Immediate alerts are too noisy unless temperature is critical.

memories.title: Critical temperature exception
memories.content: Critical greenhouse temperature events should bypass the daily digest and trigger an immediate alert.
memories.raw_content: Critical temperature should still notify immediately; that is the exception to the digest rule.

memories.title: Irrigation review
memories.content: The team plans to review irrigation calibration next Friday.
memories.raw_content: Next Friday we should review whether the irrigation calibration is still accurate.

memories.title: Preferred report format
memories.content: The fictional operator prefers concise daily summaries with evidence links.
memories.raw_content: Please keep the daily summary concise and attach an evidence link to each decision.

memories.title: Offline-first technical choice
memories.content: The demo architecture keeps source records local and treats cloud model calls as optional adapters.
memories.raw_content: Let's keep source records local; cloud model calls should remain optional adapters.

memories.title: Superseded alert policy
memories.content: An early Aurora proposal recommended immediate alerts for every sensor change, but this proposal was superseded by the daily digest policy.
memories.raw_content: Early idea: alert on every sensor change. Later decision: replace this with a daily digest except for critical temperature.
